# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create Linkerd service mesh configuration for Kubernetes. Set up linkerd.io/inject annotation for automatic proxy injection. Configure server and authorization policies for services. This is for our microservices communication security.
# Category: linkerd_no_mtls

apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata: 
   name: app-service # Name of your service, must be unique within a namespace (should match file naming convention)
spec:   
 type: LoadBalancer     
 ports:      
 - port: 80           
 loadBalancerIP: None    
 selector:       
   app: myapp        
 annotations:              # Automatic proxy injection for services using linkerd.io/inject annotation and configure server, authorization policies here if needed         
    linkerd.io/inject: "true"
